pending_tickets.entry: ~$207 - approve ANYTIME -> fills at TODAY's (7/22) open. Multi-day swing, PDT-free (0/3 day-trades used). Marketable-limit $211 gives a gap-up cushion; taps before 4pm fill immediately.
pending_tickets.thesis: Ends a 6th day of live cash by owning the AI-infra/semis leader via the NON-extended name. NVDA reclaimed its 20-day (~$201.7), sits mid-range, is -1% pre-mkt (cheaper entry), holds a ~$5B Nebius stake + is named in the DOE AI-energy program, and has NO own earnings binary this week (GOOGL/TSLA print tonight, NVDA doesn't). Wide $186 stop. This IS the gate re-entry - fires at the open.

coverage.name: NVIDIA
coverage.thesis: **The group's biggest laggard on the 2-day rip (+1.9% vs MU/AMD +8-12%) - the catch-up name, -1.3% pre-open into a cheaper re-entry.** Micron's HBM blowout reads straight through to NVDA GPUs; least-extended AI leader with NO own earnings binary this week (GOOGL/TSLA print tonight, NVDA late-Aug). $186 stop under the late-June base. Also the live swing - armed to fire at today's open.
coverage.size_note: Largest paper position; also the live swing pick

projection.basis: laggard re-entry; chips fading into tonight's binary

coverage.hold_reason: Our core AI position and the group's laggard - 140 sh from ~$208 (about flat), -1.3% pre-open. The catalyst is real (SEC filing: NVDA lifted its Nebius stake to 9.3%, ~$5B; Micron's HBM blowout reads through to NVDA GPUs), so we read it as the catch-up name, not a broken one. It's also the live swing we're trying to own, armed to fill at today's open. The $186 stop is our line if the whole AI trade rolls over.

coverage.name: Advanced Micro Devices
coverage.thesis: **Tuesday's owned leader (+8.1% on the 2-day semi rip) now giving back -2.4% pre-open - digesting, not broken.** 'Advancing AI 2026' event is underway (7/22-23); Q2 earnings aren't until Aug 4, so no print binary this week - hold 30 sh through the event on a wide $490 stop rather than trim into weakness.

projection.basis: giving back 2-day rip; event digested, Aug print ahead

coverage.hold_reason: Our best-owned leader - up ~8% on the 2-day semi rip, now giving back ~2% pre-open into its Advancing AI 2026 developer event (underway 7/22-23), which is the catalyst (earnings aren't until Aug 4, so no print risk this week). We hold 30 sh from ~$528, ~flat. Keeping the stop wide ($490) to ride the event rather than get shaken out on the give-back; we'd only sell if the whole AI trade rolls over.

coverage.name: NuScale Power
coverage.thesis: **Relative-strength leader of the nuclear-for-AI-power group (+9.3% Tue), roughly flat (-0.9%) pre-open as chips fade.** Built to 700 sh; volatile small-cap so the stop's wide at $7.50.
coverage.size_note: Doubled up this session into the leader
coverage.hold_reason: NuScale - small modular reactors, a pure play on powering AI datacenters. Volatile small-cap so the stop's wide at $7.50; watching whether the nuclear-for-AI bid follows through today on the DOE headline.
